seoTitle: St Andrews vs St Arnaud — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between St Andrews and St Arnaud. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: St Andrews vs St Arnaud: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in St Andrews and St Arnaud.
heading: St Andrews vs St Arnaud — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between St Andrews, Victoria and St Arnaud, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: St Arnaud has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to St Andrews (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is St Andrews or St Arnaud safer from flooding?
faq.answer: St Andrews has a flood risk score of 41/100, while St Arnaud scores 21/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: St Andrews scores 59/100 for bushfire risk. St Arnaud scores 18/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in St Andrews or St Arnaud?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. St Arnaud has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.35% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
